=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 11/7/02, Ann Arbor, Michigan, University Of Michigan, Crisler Arena, 2CDR

Unknown Lineage and Taper. Drop between CDr
Great sound

CD1

1 intro + Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano), 2 Carrying A Torch  (Bob on piano), 3 Tombstone Blues (Bob on piano), 4 You Ain't Goin' Nowhere (Bob on piano), 5 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano), 6 Brown Sugar, 7 One Too Many Mornings (acoustic), 8 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic), (Bob on piano, Larry on cittern, Charlie on electric guitar and Tony on standup bass), 9 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue (acoustic), 10 Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp), 11 The Times They Are A-Changin' (acoustic), 12 Old Man (acoustic) (Song by Neil Young), (Bob and Larry on acoustic guitars, Charlie on electric guitar and Tony on electric bass),

CD2

1 Honest With Me (Bob on piano and Larry on slide guitar), 2 The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll (acoustic), 3 High Water (For Charley Patton) (Bob on piano), 4 Mutineer (Song by Warren Zevon) (Bob on piano and Larry on pedal steel), 5 Floater (Too Much To Ask) (Bob on piano), 6 Summer Days (Tony on standup bass), (encore), 7 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic), 8 All Along The Watchtower 

Concert # 1480 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 27 of the 2002 US Fall Tour. 2002 concert # 97.
Concert # 81 with the 13th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).



7-9, 11, 12, 14, 19 acoustic with the band.
1-5, 8, 13, 15-17 Bob Dylan (piano).
10 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
13 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
16 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
4, 6, 12, 19 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).

6 new songs (30%) compared to previous concert. No new songs for this tour
